subject: Add 'both balance sheets' capitalization priority option to Q6
body:
Add a new option to the wizard's Q6 (asset recognition) question that
allows users to indicate both parties want to capitalize and show an
asset. This favors Model 3 (Joint Development) and Model 4 (BOT) where
both parties can recognize assets on their balance sheets.

- Add 'both-balance-sheets' option with appropriate model scores
- Update BUSINESS_GUIDE.md with asset recognition options table
- Add model selection by capitalization priority section to framework docs
title: Add 'both balance sheets' capitalization priority option to Q6
